summary: P0 fix verification: /api/alegra/accounts now uses /categories and returns real Alegra accounts. All 8 feature tests passed. 10/10 backend tests passed. Frontend account selectors load real data. AI Chat works with account suggestions.

ui_bugs.issue: chat-float-btn is positioned at y=1000 in a 1080px viewport (barely visible/clickable at bottom edge). Requires JS click to activate reliably in Playwright. Real users can still click it but it's at the very edge.

issues: Status badge CSS (from iteration_6) still shows dark-mode colors (text-blue-300 on light bg) - not retested this iteration but likely still present

action_items: LOW: Status badge CSS dark-mode issue from iteration_6 likely still present (not retested)
critical_code_review_comments: Search placeholder says 'Buscar por código o nombre...' but NIIF accounts have no PUC code (code=null). Placeholder could say 'Buscar por nombre...' to avoid confusion.
ai_chat.py gather_accounts_context() limits each type to 20 accounts per type (max 20). For large plans this may miss some accounts. Consider increasing the limit.

AlegraAccountSelector search for 'banco' returns 'Sin resultados' in income-type selector — correct behavior since Bancos are asset-type, but the UX could show a hint that this selector is filtered to income accounts only.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests pass — accounts API returns real list, AI chat responds with account suggestions)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (account selectors load real data, chat widget works, settings cuentas predeterminadas has 14 selectors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix verified working: 1) /api/alegra/accounts returns real hierarchical account tree from Alegra /categories endpoint (not empty, not dict). 2) AlegraAccountSelector in Causación Ingresos shows real accounts grouped by type (INGRESOS: Alquiler Oficina, Ventas, Ingresos financieros, etc.). 3) Type filter works correctly. 4) Settings > Cuentas Predeterminadas tab has 14 AlegraAccountSelector components. 5) AI Chat widget opens, has welcome message, input field visible. 6) Backend chat test confirms AI suggests accounts for 'causar arrendamiento $3M'. Remaining issue from iter_6: status badge CSS dark-mode colors on light background (MEDIUM priority, not yet fixed).
rca_of_issue: Previous iteration had: Alegra /accounts endpoint returned 403. Fix: use /categories endpoint which returns 233 accounts in tree format. _transform_categories() maps the format correctly. Backend now handles 403 by returning [] as fallback. All tests confirm the fix is working.
